_comment: Synthetic pre-market wire for the fintech universe. Same structural seeds as diagnostics: ft-002 duplicates ft-001 (dedupe), ft-014 is future-dated (look-ahead guard), ft-010 is materiality-1 noise (floor), EDGAR newest pull is >75min old (stale health).

items.title: Affirm Signs Exclusive BNPL Agreement With Walmart OnePay
items.raw_text: Affirm disclosed an exclusive multiyear agreement to power buy-now-pay-later installment loans through Walmart's OnePay app across Walmart U.S. checkout, online and in-store. The deal replaces a prior provider and Affirm said it expects a meaningful GMV contribution beginning in the September quarter.

items.title: Affirm Lands Exclusive OnePay Buy Now Pay Later Deal at Walmart
items.raw_text: Affirm will exclusively power installment lending in Walmart's OnePay app, replacing the prior BNPL provider across U.S. checkout.

items.title: Upstart Preannounces Q2 Revenue Above Guidance, Reinstates Full-Year Outlook
items.raw_text: Upstart preannounced preliminary Q2 revenue of $228-232 million, above its prior $213 million guidance, citing improved funding-partner demand and conversion gains. The company reinstated full-year revenue guidance it had previously withdrawn.

items.title: CFPB Interpretive Rule Treating BNPL as Credit Cards Vacated by Court
items.raw_text: A federal court vacated the CFPB interpretive rule that applied Truth in Lending credit-card dispute and chargeback requirements to buy-now-pay-later lenders. Industry groups called it a compliance reprieve, though the bureau may appeal or re-propose.

items.title: SoFi Tops 11 Million Members as Direct Deposit Adoption Accelerates
items.raw_text: SoFi said it surpassed 11 million members and reported record direct-deposit adoption among new checking customers, a key driver of deposit funding costs. Management reiterated its full-year EPS guidance.

items.title: Block Expands Cash App Borrow Nationally After FDIC Clearance
items.raw_text: Block began a national rollout of Cash App Borrow short-term lending after its bank partner received regulatory clearance, extending access to most U.S. states. Block framed the product as a key lever for Cash App monetization and gross-profit growth.

items.title: PayPal Strikes Deal to Add Branded Checkout to Amazon-Powered Stores
items.raw_text: PayPal announced an agreement to offer its branded checkout button across merchants on a major commerce platform, expanding branded-checkout reach. PayPal said the partnership supports its transaction-margin-dollar growth target.

items.title: Robinhood Launches Tokenized U.S. Equities for EU Customers
items.raw_text: Robinhood launched tokenized U.S. stock and ETF trading for European Union customers on a layer-2 blockchain, with plans to extend to private-company exposure. The launch broadens Robinhood's crypto and international product line.

items.title: Nubank Receives Full Banking License in Mexico
items.raw_text: Nubank received approval for a full banking license in Mexico, allowing it to offer payroll accounts and a broader deposit and lending suite in its second-largest market. The company said the license supports faster funding-cost improvement.

items.title: Toast to Webcast Presentation at Upcoming Investor Conference
items.raw_text: Toast said it will webcast a fireside chat at an upcoming investor conference. A replay will be posted to the company's investor relations website.

items.title: BILL Holdings Reports Record Spend & Expense Card Volume
items.raw_text: BILL Holdings said its Spend & Expense card payment volume hit a quarterly record, lifting interchange-driven revenue. Management pointed to small-business adoption as the growth driver.

items.title: Shift4 to Acquire European Payments Processor in $1.5B Deal
items.raw_text: Shift4 agreed to acquire a European payments processor for about $1.5 billion to expand its international acquiring footprint. Shift4 said the deal is expected to be accretive to adjusted EBITDA within the first year.

items.title: Marqeta Renews Core Program Agreement With Block Through 2030
items.raw_text: Marqeta renewed its core card-issuing program agreement with Block through 2030, removing a key contract-concentration overhang. The renewal preserves Marqeta's largest customer relationship on revised economics.

items.title: Affirm Investor Call on Walmart Deal Begins
items.raw_text: Affirm's investor call to discuss the Walmart OnePay agreement is scheduled to begin at 9:00 a.m. ET. Management will take analyst questions afterward.

items.title: Subprime Consumer Delinquencies Tick Up, Pressuring Lender Funding Costs
items.raw_text: New data show subprime consumer loan delinquencies rose for a third straight month, with credit-card and installment categories leading. Analysts warned the trend could raise funding costs and loss provisions for consumer lenders into the back half.

items.title: Affirm Prices $750M Asset-Backed Securitization at Tighter Spreads
items.raw_text: Affirm priced a $750 million asset-backed securitization of installment loans at spreads tighter than its prior deal, signaling improved funding conditions. The proceeds will support origination capacity heading into the holiday season.
